summary: Implemented same-origin latency probe sampler in src/metrics/probeSampler.ts with: fetchProbe() for cache-busted timed fetch requests, computeMedianRtt() for median RTT calculation filtering failed probes, computeJitter() for mean absolute consecutive RTT difference (RFC 3550-style), and ProbeSampler class with configurable URL/interval/windowSize, start/stop lifecycle, and getSnapshot() returning NetworkSnapshot. Created barrel export in src/metrics/index.ts. Fixed TS errors in existing E2E tests (added @ts-expect-error for Vite runtime imports). Added ADR 007 documenting design decisions. All quality gates pass: lint, typecheck, 124 unit tests, 18 E2E tests.
